changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO metric_domains (id, name, description, code) VALUES (1, 'Likelihood', 'Probability an attack will cause damage.', 'likelihood') , (2, 'Impact', 'The extent an attack will cause damage.', 'impact') , (3, 'Amplified Reputation', 'The increase in risk based on reputational factors.', 'amplified_reputation') , (4, 'Amplified Operational', 'The increase in risk based on operational factors.', 'amplified_operational') , (5, 'Amplified Legal', 'The increase in risk based on legal factors.', 'amplified_legal') ;
ALTER SEQUENCE metric_domains_id_seq RESTART WITH 6;
